top_signals.title: SBI Group launches Japan’s first trust bank-backed stablecoin JPYSC
top_signals.summary: JPYSC's availability will be limited to SBI VC Trade accounts, until regulatory and tax treatment of the stablecoin is clarified.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Indonesia Tightens Oversight of Financial Influencers
top_signals.summary: Indonesia is requiring financial influencers to disclose paid promotions and obtain licenses to recommend assets as Southeast Asia’s largest economy joins a global movement to tighten oversight of the social media personalities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix bets on AI demand with bumper $29bn US listing
top_signals.summary: South Korean chipmaker capitalises on central role in global AI bonanza
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hyundai workers in South Korea vote to strike over fears of robots replacing them
top_signals.summary: Union at country’s largest carmaker wants greater say over how AI and automation are introduced
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
top_signals.summary: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

top_signals.title: B&M poaches Asda exec in bid to shake off accounting blunder
top_signals.summary: B&M has poached an Asda executive to replace the chief financial officer who quit over a £7m accounting blunder, as the retailer eyes a drastic turnaround. The FTSE 250 firm said on Wednesday that Atheeq Akbar, currently vice president of commercial finance at Asda, will join the firm as chief financial officer next year. B&M’s [...]

top_signals.title: Scattered Spider members plead guilty to hacking Transport for London
top_signals.summary: Two members of the 'Scattered Spider' cybercrime group pleaded guilty to hacking the Transport for London (TfL) systems in 2024. [...]
